title: echofinemap: Getting Started
text: ABF fastest fine-mapping method requires LD matrix external software. good first pass identifying credible sets. Inspect results – ABF adds posterior probability columns credible set indicator:
code: ## Load bundled example data dat <- echodata::BST1 LD_matrix <- echodata::BST1_LD_matrix  ## Strip any previous fine-mapping columns so we start fresh dat_clean <- echofinemap::drop_finemap_cols(dat = dat) ## Gathering method sources. ## Gathering method citations. ## Dropping 11 pre-existing fine-mapping columns. ## Run ABF dat_abf <- echofinemap::ABF(dat = dat_clean, verbose = TRUE) ## Loading required namespace: MungeSumstats ## Preparing sample size column (N). ## Computing effective sample size using the LDSC method: ##  Neff = (N_CAS+N_CON) * (N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON)) / mean((N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON))[(N_CAS+N_CON)==max(N_CAS+N_CON)])) ## + Mapping colnames from MungeSumstats ==> echolocatoR ## Running ABF. ## Warning in .maybe_warn_merge_dots(...): merge.data.table() received 1 unknown ## keyword argument which will be ignored: [on] ## Key fine-mapping columns added by ABF abf_cols <- grep("ABF|PP|CS", names(dat_abf), value = TRUE) print(abf_cols) ## [1] "mean.CS" "PP"      "CS" ## Top SNPs by ABF posterior probability topsnps <- head(dat_abf[order(-dat_abf$PP),                          c("SNP","CHR","POS","P","PP","CS")], 10) print(topsnps) ## Key: <SNP> ##            SNP   CHR      POS         P           PP    CS ##         <char> <int>    <int>     <num>        <num> <num> ##  1:  rs4698412     4 15737348 2.058e-28 3.870528e-01     0 ##  2: rs11724635     4 15737101 2.832e-28 3.064438e-01     0 ##  3:  rs4698413     4 15737882 3.849e-28 2.427324e-01     0 ##  4: rs34559912     4 15730146 1.213e-27 6.211324e-02     0 ##  5:  rs4613561     4 15737890 1.039e-25 1.411516e-03     0 ##  6:  rs6449168     4 15727713 1.766e-24 1.298016e-04     0 ##  7:  rs4266290     4 15737118 3.111e-24 4.631918e-05     0 ##  8:  rs4403048     4 15737120 3.057e-24 4.631918e-05     0 ##  9:  rs4263397     4 15739390 1.175e-23 2.058995e-05     0 ## 10:  rs4631042     4 15712550 8.208e-23 1.318113e-06     0

title: echofinemap: Getting Started
text: multifinemap() runs one fine-mapping methods single call. example runs ABF, SUSIE, FINEMAP together. Note: chunk set eval=FALSE SUSIE FINEMAP can slow FINEMAP requires external binary. See individual method help pages installation instructions.
code: dat_clean <- echofinemap::drop_finemap_cols(dat = echodata::BST1) LD_matrix <- echodata::BST1_LD_matrix locus_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), echodata::locus_dir)  dat2 <- echofinemap::multifinemap(     dat = dat_clean,     locus_dir = locus_dir,     LD_matrix = LD_matrix,     finemap_methods = c("ABF", "SUSIE", "FINEMAP") )

title: Fine-map with ABF — ABF
text: dat Fine-mapping results data. credset_thresh minimum mean Posterior Probability (across fine-mapping methods used) SNPs included "mean.CS" column. compute_n compute per-SNP sample size (new column "N"). column "N" already present dat, column used extract per-SNP sample sizes argument compute_n ignored. column "N" present dat, one following options can supplied compute_n: 0 N computed. >0 number >0 provided, value set N every row. **Note**: Computing N way incorrect avoided possible. "sum" N computed : cases (N_CAS) + controls (N_CON), long columns present. "ldsc" N computed effective sample size: Neff =(N_CAS+N_CON)*(N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON)) / mean((N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON))(N_CAS+N_CON)==max(N_CAS+N_CON)). "giant" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 2 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). "metal" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 4 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). sdY Standard deviation quantitative trait. case_control Whether summary statistics come case-control study (e.g. GWAS Alzheimer's Disease ) (TRUE) quantitative study (e.g. GWAS height, eQTL) (FALSE). verbose Print messages.

title: Run GCTA-COJO — COJO
text: dat Fine-mapping results data. locus_dir Locus-specific directory store results . bfile Input PLINK binary PED files, e.g. test.fam, test.bim test.bed (see PLINK user manual details). fullSS_path Path full summary statistics file (GWAS QTL) want fine-map. usually best provide absolute path rather relative path. conditioned_snps SNPs conditions fine-mapping (e.g. COJO). exclude Specify list SNPs excluded analysis. prefix Prefix use file names. run_stepwise --cojo-slct: Perform stepwise model selection procedure select independently associated SNPs. Results saved *.jma file additional file *.jma.ldr showing LD correlations SNPs. run_conditional --cojo-cond: Perform association analysis included SNPs conditional given  list SNPs. Results saved *.cma.  conditional SNP effects (.e. bC) labelled "NA"  multivariate correlation SNP question  covariate SNPs > 0.9. run_joint --cojo-joint: Fit included SNPs estimate joint effects without model selection. Results saved *.jma file additional file *.jma.ldr. credset_thresh minimum mean Posterior Probability (across fine-mapping methods used) SNPs included "mean.CS" column. freq_cutoff Minimum variant frequency cutoff. compute_n compute per-SNP sample size (new column "N"). column "N" already present dat, column used extract per-SNP sample sizes argument compute_n ignored. column "N" present dat, one following options can supplied compute_n: 0 N computed. >0 number >0 provided, value set N every row. **Note**: Computing N way incorrect avoided possible. "sum" N computed : cases (N_CAS) + controls (N_CON), long columns present. "ldsc" N computed effective sample size: Neff =(N_CAS+N_CON)*(N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON)) / mean((N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON))(N_CAS+N_CON)==max(N_CAS+N_CON)). "giant" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 2 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). "metal" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 4 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). colmap Column mappings object. Uses construct_colmap default. full_genome Whether run GCTA-COJO across genome-wide (TRUE), within specific locus (default: FALSE) gcta_path Path GCTA-COJO executable. verbose Print messages. ... Arguments passed COJO_args cojo_file Input summary-level statistics meta-analysis GWAS (single GWAS). Specify output root filename. cojo_slct Perform stepwise model selection procedure select independently associated SNPs. Results saved *.jma file additional file *.jma.ldr showing LD correlations SNPs. cojo_cond Perform association analysis included SNPs conditional given list SNPs. Results saved *.cma. conditional SNP effects (.e. bC) labelled "NA"  multivariate correlation SNP question   covariate SNPs > 0.9. cojo_joint Fit included SNPs estimate joint effects without model selection. Results saved  *.jma file additional file *.jma.ldr showing  LD correlations SNPs. maf Exclude SNPs minor allele frequency (MAF) less specified value, e.g. 0.01. max_maf Include SNPs MAF less specified value, e.g. 0.1. cojo_top_SNPs Perform stepwise model selection procedure select fixed number independently associated SNPs without p-value threshold. output format --cojo-slct. cojo_p Threshold p-value declare genome-wide significant hit. default value 5e-8 specified. option valid conjunction option --cojo-slct. Note: extremely time-consuming set low significance level, e.g. 5e-3. cojo_wind Specify distance d (Kb unit). assumed SNPs d Kb away complete linkage equilibrium. default value 10000 Kb (.e. 10 Mb) specified. cojo_collinear model selection procedure, program check collinearity SNPs  already selected SNP tested.  testing SNP selected multiple regression R2  selected SNPs greater cutoff value.  default, cutoff value 0.9 specified. diff_freq check difference allele frequency SNP GWAS summary datasets LD reference sample. SNPs allele frequency differences greater specified threshold value excluded analysis. default value 0.2. cojo_gc option specified, p-values adjusted genomic control method. default, genomic inflation factor calculated summary-level statistics SNPs unless specify value, e.g. --cojo-gc 1.05.

title: Run GCTA-COJO — COJO
text: Documentation Columns SNP, effect allele, allele, frequency effect allele, effect size, standard error, p-value sample size. headers keywords omitted program. Important: "A1" needs effect allele "A2" allele "freq" frequency "A1".' Note: 1) case-control study, effect size log(odds ratio) corresponding standard error. 2) Please always input summary statistics SNPs even analysis focuses subset SNPs program needs summary data SNPs calculate phenotypic variance. can use one --extract options (Data management) limit  COJO analysis certain genomic region.General results columns: Chr Chromosome. SNP SNP RSID. bp Physical position. refA Effect allele. freq Frequency effect allele original data. b Effect size. se Standard error. p p-value original GWAS meta-analysis. n Estimated effective sample size. freq_geno Frequency effect allele reference sample. Stepwise analysis results columns: bJ Effect size joint analysis selected SNPs. bJ_se Standard error joint analysis selected SNPs. pJ p-value joint analysis selected SNPs. LD_r LD correlation SNP SNP + 1  SNPs list. LD_r2 LD_r squared. CS Whether SNP Credible Set, defined SNP pJ<(1-credset_thresh). Conditional analysis results columns: bC Effect size conditional analysis. bC_se Standard error conditional analysis. pC p-value conditional analysis. CS Whether SNP Credible Set, defined SNP pC<(1-credset_thresh).

Gathered "*.snpvar_ridge_constrained.gz" output files PolyFun. non-parametric Computing prior causal probabilities non-parametrically. robust approach, computationally intensive requires access individual-level genotypic data large reference panel (optimally >10,000 population-matched individuals). FINEMAP Uses FINEMAP. max_causal maximum number non-zero effects (thus causal variants). compute_n compute per-SNP sample size (new column "N"). column "N" already present dat, column used extract per-SNP sample sizes argument compute_n ignored. column "N" present dat, one following options can supplied compute_n: 0 N computed. >0 number >0 provided, value set N every row. **Note**: Computing N way incorrect avoided possible. "sum" N computed : cases (N_CAS) + controls (N_CON), long columns present. "giant" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 2 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). "metal" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 4 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). credset_thresh minimum mean Posterior Probability (across fine-mapping methods used) SNPs included "mean.CS" column. rescale_priors prior probabilities supplied, rescale 0-1 (.e. rescaled_priors = priors / sum(priors)). case_control Whether summary statistics come case-control study (e.g. GWAS Alzheimer's Disease ) (TRUE) quantitative study (e.g. GWAS height, eQTL) (FALSE). conda_env Conda environment use. force_new saved results already exist given locus_dir, skip re-running FINEMAP use (default: force_new). title: Fine-map with SUSIE — SUSIE
text: dat Fine-mapping results data. LD_matrix Linkage Disequilibrium (LD) matrix use fine-mapping. case_control Whether summary statistics come case-control study (e.g. GWAS Alzheimer's Disease ) (TRUE) quantitative study (e.g. GWAS height, eQTL) (FALSE). max_causal maximum number non-zero effects (thus causal variants). compute_n compute per-SNP sample size (new column "N"). column "N" already present dat, column used extract per-SNP sample sizes argument compute_n ignored. column "N" present dat, one following options can supplied compute_n: 0 N computed. >0 number >0 provided, value set N every row. **Note**: Computing N way incorrect avoided possible. "sum" N computed : cases (N_CAS) + controls (N_CON), long columns present. "ldsc" N computed effective sample size: Neff =(N_CAS+N_CON)*(N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON)) / mean((N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON))(N_CAS+N_CON)==max(N_CAS+N_CON)). "giant" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 2 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). "metal" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 4 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). priors_col [Optional] Name column dat extract SNP-wise prior probabilities . rescale_priors prior probabilities supplied, rescale 0-1 (.e. rescaled_priors = priors / sum(priors)). credset_thresh minimum mean Posterior Probability (across fine-mapping methods used) SNPs included "mean.CS" column. scaled_prior_variance prior variance, divided var(y) ((1/(n-1))yty susie_suff_stat); , prior variance non-zero element b var(y) * scaled_prior_variance. value provided either scalar vector length L. estimate_prior_variance = TRUE, provides initial estimates prior variances. estimate_residual_variance estimate_residual_variance = TRUE, residual variance estimated, using residual_variance initial value. estimate_residual_variance = FALSE, residual variance fixed value supplied residual_variance. estimate_prior_variance estimate_prior_variance = TRUE, prior variance estimated (separate parameter L effects). provided, scaled_prior_variance used initial value optimization. estimate_prior_variance = FALSE, prior variance L effects determined value supplied scaled_prior_variance. residual_variance Variance residual. estimate_residual_variance = TRUE, value provides initial estimate residual variance. default, set var(y) susie (1/(n-1))yty susie_suff_stat. max_iter Maximum number IBSS iterations perform. estimate_prior_method method used estimating prior variance. estimate_prior_method = "simple" used, likelihood specified prior variance compared likelihood variance zero, setting larger likelihood retained. var_y [Optional] User-supplied phenotypic variance value(s). Can one following: NULL: Variance inferred automatically SUSIE. Numeric vector: Variance computed directly vector. Character string: name column dat  extract numeric vector compute variance. "case_control" Variance inferred proportion cases/controls study. works "N_cases" "N_controls" columns dat. plot_track_fit Record iteration make GIF fine-mapping algorithm learning causal variants. WARNING!: Making plot can take long time  many iterations. return_all_CS >1 Credible Set identified, return (TRUE), just first (FALSE). file_prefix Prefix path output plot file. specified, plot, plots, saved temporary directory generated using tempdir. verbose Print messages.

title: Fine-map with SUSIE — SUSIE
text: Notes convergence: susieR often give warning: IBSS algorithm converge 100 iterations!. means results might necessarily reliable. several things can try avoid : Make sure susieR --date: devtools::install_github("stephenslab/susieR@0.9.0") Increase max_causal (e.g. 5 => 10). Increase max_iter (e.g. 100 => 1000), though take longer. Decrease locus window size, also speed  algorithm potentially miss causal variants far lead SNP. Changing estimate_prior_method seem affect convergence warnings. Notes variance: GitHub Issue estimate_residual_variance=TRUE without providing var_y L>1, susieR throw error: Estimating residual variance failed: estimated value negative Running susieR var_y = var(b) provides exactly  results.

text: dat Fine-mapping results data. locus_dir Locus-specific directory store results . fullSS_path Path full summary statistics file (GWAS QTL) want fine-map. usually best provide absolute path rather relative path. finemap_args named nested list containing additional arguments fine-mapping method. e.g. finemap_args = list(FINEMAP=list(), PAINTOR=list(method="")) dataset_type kind dataset fine-mapping (e.g. GWAS, eQTL, tQTL). also used creating subdirectory results stored (e.g. Data/<dataset_type>/Kunkle_2019). force_new_finemap default, fine-mapping results file  given locus already present, echolocatoR just use preexisting file. Set force_new_finemap=T override re-run fine-mapping. LD_matrix Linkage Disequilibrium (LD) matrix use fine-mapping. n_causal maximum number potential causal SNPs per locus. parameter used somewhat differently different fine-mapping tools. See tool-specific functions details. conditioned_snps SNPs conditions fine-mapping (e.g. COJO). compute_n compute per-SNP sample size (new column "N"). column "N" already present dat, column used extract per-SNP sample sizes argument compute_n ignored. column "N" present dat, one following options can supplied compute_n: 0 N computed. >0 number >0 provided, value set N every row. **Note**: Computing N way incorrect avoided possible. "sum" N computed : cases (N_CAS) + controls (N_CON), long columns present. "ldsc" N computed effective sample size: Neff =(N_CAS+N_CON)*(N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON)) / mean((N_CAS/(N_CAS+N_CON))(N_CAS+N_CON)==max(N_CAS+N_CON)). "giant" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 2 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). "metal" N computed effective sample size: Neff = 4 / (1/N_CAS + 1/N_CON). credset_thresh minimum mean Posterior Probability (across fine-mapping methods used) SNPs included "mean.CS" column. case_control Whether summary statistics come case-control study (e.g. GWAS Alzheimer's Disease ) (TRUE) quantitative study (e.g. GWAS height, eQTL) (FALSE). priors_col [Optional] Name column dat extract SNP-wise prior probabilities . seed Set random seed reproducible results. verbose Print messages. nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable). conda_env Conda environment use.

title: echofinemap 1.0.0
text: FINEMAP: Added early runnability check via FINEMAP_check_runnable() — validates binary can execute preparing data, platform-specific error messages Apple Silicon dylib issues. FINEMAP: Added automatic x86_64 dynamic library setup Apple Silicon via FINEMAP_setup_dylibs(). Builds/downloads x86_64 libzstd, libomp, gcc runtime libraries, rewrites binary paths install_name_tool. FINEMAP: System PATH detection — checks conda-installed FINEMAP downloading GitHub releases. PAINTOR: Wired functional annotation pipeline end--end. PAINTOR_prepare_annotations() pure-R reimplementation original Python 2.7 AnnotateLocus.py, converting BED files binary annotation matrices passing annotation names PAINTOR executable. PAINTOR: New annot_paintor parameter downloading comprehensive PAINTOR functional annotation library (~7GB, 10,000+ annotations) BOX. Annotations cached locally first download. PAINTOR: New PAINTOR_fetch_annotations() PAINTOR_list_annotations() functions managing annotation library. POLYFUN: Fixed parametric mode filename pattern — parametric output chromosome filename, import now matches correctly.

title: echofinemap 1.0.0
text: FINEMAP: Fixed sparse matrix (dsCMatrix) handling FINEMAP_construct_data() converting dense matrix fwrite(). POLYFUN: Fixed silent error swallowing POLYFUN_import_priors() — replaced try({}) proper exit code checking output file verification. POLYFUN: Fixed requireNamespace("Ckmeans.1d.dp") properly error informative message instead silently continuing. POLYFUN: Fixed POLYFUN_install() blocking non-interactive sessions gating readline() behind interactive() check. POLYFUN: Removed hardcoded path override POLYFUN_compute_priors() overwriting properly resolved polyfun path. PAINTOR: Removed setup_gcc(version="clang") call PAINTOR_install() required sudo symlink creation. setup_gcc(): Rewritten Apple Silicon support — checks /opt/homebrew (ARM) /usr/local (Intel) Homebrew paths, handles multiple gcc installation formats. Tests: Split monolithic test-multifinemap.R focused subtests (BST1, LRRK2 network skip, POLYFUN_SUSIE dependency checks). Tests: Added proper skip guards FINEMAP, PAINTOR, POLYFUN tests direct function checks instead tryCatch wrappers. Local R CMD check fixes compatibility updates.
